facebook.content: In our upcoming Kingdom Report newsletter, we're shedding light on the critical phenomenon of "Spiritual Idolatry in the Digital Age." Have you ever noticed how easily social media can distract us from our walk with God? A recent survey revealed that 75% of Christians say they spend more time on social media than in prayer. What are you doing to protect your faith from the digital influences that surround you?
